# Requirements Document for 'OnlineLibrary' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineLibrary' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to search and browse books, borrow and return books, write reviews, manage reservations, and track their borrowing history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'OnlineLibrary' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'OnlineLibrary' web application will consist of the following ten pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Library Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: browse-books-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: my-borrows-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - **ID: book-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-status** - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - **ID: borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - **ID: reviews-section** - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Borrow Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: borrow-page** - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - **ID: borrow-book-info** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - **ID: due-date-display** - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - **ID: confirm-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - **ID: cancel-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- **Page Title**: My Borrowings
- **Overview**: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-borrows-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - **ID: filter-status** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - **ID: borrows-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - **ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id}** - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - **ID: edit-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - **ID: delete-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: book-info-display** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-book** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: borrow-history** - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Payment Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: payment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - **ID: fine-amount-display** - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - **ID: confirm-payment-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - **ID: back-to-profile** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'OnlineLibrary' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St
  ```

### 2. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3
  ```

### 3. Borrowings Data
- **File Name**: `borrowings.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00
  ```

### 4. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20
  ```

### 6. Fines Data
- **File Name**: `fines.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

[DEBUG] Review Content for SystemArchitect -> FrontendDeveloper:
  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'OnlineLibrary' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineLibrary' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to search and browse books, borrow and return books, write reviews, manage reservations, and track their borrowing history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'OnlineLibrary' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'OnlineLibrary' web application will consist of the following ten pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Library Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.   - **ID: browse-books-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.   - **ID: my-borrows-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.  ### 2. Book Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Book Catalog - **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options. - **Elements**:   - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.   - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.   - **ID: book-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.   - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Book Details Page - **Page Title**: Book Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book. - **Elements**:   - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.   - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.   - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.   - **ID: book-status** - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).   - **ID: borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.   - **ID: reviews-section** - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.   - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to write a review.   - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.  ### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page - **Page Title**: Borrow Confirmation - **Overview**: A page to confirm book borrowing details. - **Elements**:   - **ID: borrow-page** - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.   - **ID: borrow-book-info** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.   - **ID: due-date-display** - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).   - **ID: confirm-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.   - **ID: cancel-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.  ### 5. My Borrowings Page - **Page Title**: My Borrowings - **Overview**: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: my-borrows-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.   - **ID: filter-status** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).   - **ID: borrows-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.   - **ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id}** - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. My Reservations Page - **Page Title**: My Reservations - **Overview**: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.   - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.   - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. My Reviews Page - **Page Title**: My Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.   - **ID: edit-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).   - **ID: delete-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: book-info-display** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.   - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.   - **ID: back-to-book** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.   - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).   - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.   - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.   - **ID: borrow-history** - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 10. Payment Confirmation Page - **Page Title**: Payment Confirmation - **Overview**: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines. - **Elements**:   - **ID: payment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.   - **ID: fine-amount-display** - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.   - **ID: confirm-payment-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.   - **ID: back-to-profile** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'OnlineLibrary' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   username|email|phone|address   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St   jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St   ```  ### 2. Books Data - **File Name**: `books.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8   2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6   3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7   4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5   5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3   ```  ### 3. Borrowings Data - **File Name**: `borrowings.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0   2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0   3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00   ```  ### 4. Reservations Data - **File Name**: `reservations.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active   2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled   ```  ### 5. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03   2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20   ```  ### 6. Fines Data - **File Name**: `fines.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30   ```  All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

=== LLM_call: FrontendDeveloper ===
INPUT: === user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'OnlineLibrary' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineLibrary' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to search and browse books, borrow and return books, write reviews, manage reservations, and track their borrowing history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'OnlineLibrary' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'OnlineLibrary' web application will consist of the following ten pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Library Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: browse-books-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: my-borrows-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - **ID: book-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-status** - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - **ID: borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - **ID: reviews-section** - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Borrow Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: borrow-page** - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - **ID: borrow-book-info** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - **ID: due-date-display** - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - **ID: confirm-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - **ID: cancel-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- **Page Title**: My Borrowings
- **Overview**: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-borrows-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - **ID: filter-status** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - **ID: borrows-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - **ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id}** - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - **ID: edit-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - **ID: delete-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: book-info-display** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-book** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: borrow-history** - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Payment Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: payment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - **ID: fine-amount-display** - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - **ID: confirm-payment-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - **ID: back-to-profile** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'OnlineLibrary' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St
  ```

### 2. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3
  ```

### 3. Borrowings Data
- **File Name**: `borrowings.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00
  ```

### 4. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20
  ```

### 6. Fines Data
- **File Name**: `fines.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

        {
            "agent_name": "SystemArchitect",
            "prompt": """You are a System Architect specializing in Flask web application design specifications with expertise in local text file data management.

Your goal is to produce a comprehensive design specification document that enables Backend and Frontend developers to work independently and efficiently.

Task Details:
- Read user_task_description from CONTEXT
- Create design_spec.md containing three thorough sections: Flask Routes, HTML Templates, and Data Schemas
- Include details needed to implement backend routes, frontend element IDs, navigation, and local file data schemas
- Do NOT assume or alter any user requirements; no implementation included here

**Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend Development)**

For each route, specify the following:
- URL path (e.g., /dashboard, /book/<int:book_id>)
- Function name (lowercase with underscores)
- HTTP method (GET, POST)
- Template file rendered (e.g., dashboard.html)
- Context variables passed to template with exact names and types (str, int, list, dict, float, etc.)

Requirements:
- Root '/' route must redirect to the dashboard page
- Include routes for all pages listed in the user requirements, covering user actions (borrow, return, review, reservation)
- Context variables must clearly define data structures, especially lists of dicts
- Borrow and return flows should include necessary form processing routes and confirmation displays

**Section 2: HTML Template Specifications (Frontend Development)**

For each HTML template, specify:
- Filename and path (templates/{template_name}.html)
- Page title (content for both <title> and <h1> tags)
- All required element IDs with exact matching case and type (div, button, input, textarea, dropdown, table, etc.)
- Context variables accessible in the template with full structure details
- Navigation mappings using Flask's url_for with exact function names and route parameters for dynamic links
- Include dynamic element ID patterns derived from user requirements (e.g., return-book-button-{borrow_id} → id="return-book-button-{{ borrow.borrow_id }}")

Requirements:
- Include all element IDs from the user requirements exactly as specified
- Navigation function names and context variable names must match those defined in Section 1 exactly
- Support forms for POST actions with appropriate method and action attributes

**Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend Development)**

- Filename and path (data/{filename}.txt)
- Pipe-delimited field order and exact field names
- Description of the data stored in the file

- Highlight any special parsing notes or field types as needed

Requirements:
- Follow pipe '|' delimiter strictly; no header lines
- Field order must be exact as backend will parse files without modifications
- Example data must represent typical realistic records

# Requirements Document for 'OnlineLibrary' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineLibrary' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to search and browse books, borrow and return books, write reviews, manage reservations, and track their borrowing history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'OnlineLibrary' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'OnlineLibrary' web application will consist of the following ten pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Library Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: browse-books-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: my-borrows-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - **ID: book-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-status** - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - **ID: borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - **ID: reviews-section** - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Borrow Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: borrow-page** - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - **ID: borrow-book-info** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - **ID: due-date-display** - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - **ID: confirm-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - **ID: cancel-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- **Page Title**: My Borrowings
- **Overview**: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-borrows-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - **ID: filter-status** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - **ID: borrows-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - **ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id}** - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - **ID: edit-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - **ID: delete-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: book-info-display** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-book** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: borrow-history** - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Payment Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: payment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - **ID: fine-amount-display** - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - **ID: confirm-payment-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - **ID: back-to-profile** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'OnlineLibrary' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St
  ```

### 2. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3
  ```

### 3. Borrowings Data
- **File Name**: `borrowings.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00
  ```

### 4. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20
  ```

### 6. Fines Data
- **File Name**: `fines.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

`borrow-page` (div)\n  - `borrow-book-info` (div)\n  - `due-date-display` (div)\n  - `confirm-borrow-button` (button)\n  - `cancel-borrow-button` (button)\n- **Context variables**:\n  - `book` (dict)\n  - `reservations-page` (div)\n  - `reservations-table` (table)\n  - Dynamic button IDs: `cancel-reservation-button-{{ reservation.reservation_id }}` (button)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)\n- **Context variables**:\n  - `reservations` (list of dicts with keys: `reservation_id` (int), `book_title` (str), `reservation_date` (str), `status` (str))\n- **Navigation**:\n  - `cancel-reservation-button-{{ reservation.reservation_id }}` posts to `/reservation/cancel/<reservation_id>`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` navigates to `dashboard`\n\n---\n\n### 9. my_reviews.html\n- **Path**: `templates/my_reviews.html`\n- **Page title**: \"My Reviews\"\n- **Element IDs**:\n  - `reviews-page` (div)\n  - `reviews-list` (div)\n  - Dynamic button IDs: `edit-review-button-{{ review.review_id }}` (button)\n  - Dynamic button IDs: `delete-review-button-{{ review.review_id }}` (button)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)\n- **Context variables**:\n  - `reviews` (list of dicts with keys: `review_id` (int), `book_title` (str), `rating` (int), `review_text` (str))\n- **Navigation**:\n  - `edit-review-button-{{ review.review_id }}` navigates to `/review/edit/<review_id>`\n  - `delete-review-button-{{ review.review_id }}` posts to `/review/delete/<review_id>`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` navigates to `dashboard`\n\n---\n\n### 10. write_review.html\n- **Path**: `templates/write_review.html`\n- **Page title**: \"Write Review\"\n- **Element IDs**:\n  - `write-review-page` (div)\n  - `book-info-display` (div)\n  - `rating-input` (dropdown/select)\n  - `review-text` (textarea)\n  - `submit-review-button` (button)\n  - `back-to-book` (button)\n- **Context variables**:\n  - `review` (dict) (optional, nullable) for edit mode\n  - `book` (dict)\n- **Navigation**:\n  - `submit-review-button` posts form to `/review/submit`\n  - `back-to-book` navigates to `book_details(book.book_id)`\n\n---\n\n### 11. profile.html\n- **Path**: `templates/profile.html`\n- **Page title**: \"My Profile\"\n- **Element IDs**:\n  - `profile-page` (div)\n  - `profile-username` (div)\n  - `profile-email` (input text)\n  - `profile-phone` (input text)  <!-- Note: phone displayed and editable as per data file -->\n  - `profile-address` (textarea or div)  <!-- Address editing implied -->\n  - `update-profile-button` (button)\n  - `borrow-history` (div)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)\n- **Context variables**:\n  - `username` (str)\n  - `email` (str)\n  - `phone` (str)\n  - `address` (str)\n  - `borrow_history` (list of dicts) with keys: `book_title`, `borrow_date`, `return_date`\n- **Navigation**:\n  - `update-profile-button` posts to `/profile/update`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` navigates to `dashboard`\n\n---\n\n### 12. payment_confirmation.html\n- **Path**: `templates/payment_confirmation.html`\n- **Page title**: \"Payment Confirmation\"\n- **Element IDs**:\n  - `payment-page` (div)\n  - `fine-amount-display` (div)\n  - `confirm-payment-button` (button)\n  - `back-to-profile` (button)\n- **Context variables**:\n  - `fine` (dict) with `fine_id` (int) and `amount` (float)\n- **Navigation**:\n  - `confirm-payment-button` posts to `/payment/confirm/<fine_id>`\n  - `back-to-profile` navigates to `profile`\n\n---\n\n## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend Development)\n\n### 1. users.txt\n- **Path**: `data/users.txt`\n- **Fields (pipe-delimited)**: \n  1. `username` (str)\n  2. `email` (str)\n  3. `phone` (str)\n  4. `address` (str)\n- **Description**: Stores user profile information.\n- **Example rows**:\n  - `john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St`\n  - `jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St`\n\n---\n\n### 2. books.txt\n- **Path**: `data/books.txt`\n- **Fields (pipe-delimited)**:\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `title` (str)\n  3. `author` (str)\n  4. `isbn` (str)\n  5. `genre` (str)\n  6. `publisher` (str)\n  7. `year` (int)\n  8. `description` (str)\n  9. `status` (str) - \"Available\", \"Borrowed\", \"Reserved\"\n  10. `avg_rating` (float)\n- **Description**: Stores catalog information for each book.\n- **Example rows**:\n  - `1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8`\n  - `2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6`\n  - `3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7`\n\n---\n\n### 3. borrowings.txt\n- **Path**: `data/borrowings.txt`\n- **Fields (pipe-delimited)**:\n  1. `borrow_id` (int)\n  2. `username` (str)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `borrow_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n  5. `due_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n  6. `return_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD or empty)\n  7. `status` (str) - \"Active\", \"Returned\", \"Overdue\"\n  8. `fine_amount` (float)\n- **Description**: Tracks borrowing records for users.\n- **Example rows**:\n  - `1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0`\n  - `2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0`\n  - `3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00`\n\n---\n\n### 4. reservations.txt\n- **Path**: `data/reservations.txt`\n- **Fields (pipe-delimited)**:\n  1. `reservation_id` (int)\n  2. `username` (str)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `reservation_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n  5. `status` (str) - \"Active\", \"Cancelled\"\n- **Description**: Stores book reservations by users.\n- **Example rows**:\n  - `1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active`\n  - `2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled`\n\n---\n\n### 5. reviews.txt\n- **Path**: `data/reviews.txt`\n- **Fields (pipe-delimited)**:\n  1. `review_id` (int)\n  2. `username` (str)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `rating` (int, 1-5)\n  5. `review_text` (str)\n  6. `review_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n- **Description**: Stores user reviews for books.\n- **Example rows**:\n  - `1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03`\n  - `2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20`\n\n---\n\n### 6. fines.txt\n- **Path**: `data/fines.txt`\n- **Fields (pipe-delimited)**:\n  1. `fine_id` (int)\n  2. `username` (str)\n  3. `borrow_id` (int)\n  4. `amount` (float)\n  5. `status` (str) - \"Unpaid\" or \"Paid\"\n  6. `date_issued` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n- **Description**: Records overdue fines for borrowings.\n- **Example rows**:\n  - `1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30`\n\n---\n\n\n---\n\nThis specification provides the detailed guidance for independent backend and frontend development teams, ensuring the proper mapping between Flask routes, template variables, HTML elements IDs, and local data storage schemas to support the full functionality described in the user requirements.\n"})

# Requirements Document for 'OnlineLibrary' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineLibrary' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to search and browse books, borrow and return books, write reviews, manage reservations, and track their borrowing history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'OnlineLibrary' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'OnlineLibrary' web application will consist of the following ten pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Library Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: browse-books-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: my-borrows-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - **ID: book-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-status** - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - **ID: borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - **ID: reviews-section** - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Borrow Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: borrow-page** - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - **ID: borrow-book-info** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - **ID: due-date-display** - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - **ID: confirm-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - **ID: cancel-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- **Page Title**: My Borrowings
- **Overview**: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-borrows-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - **ID: filter-status** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - **ID: borrows-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - **ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id}** - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - **ID: edit-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - **ID: delete-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: book-info-display** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-book** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: borrow-history** - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Payment Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: payment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - **ID: fine-amount-display** - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - **ID: confirm-payment-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - **ID: back-to-profile** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'OnlineLibrary' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St
  ```

### 2. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3
  ```

### 3. Borrowings Data
- **File Name**: `borrowings.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00
  ```

### 4. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20
  ```

### 6. Fines Data
- **File Name**: `fines.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

   Tool: write_text_file({"filename":"design_spec.md","content":"# OnlineLibrary Application Design Specification\n\n---\n\n## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend Development)\n\n### 1. Root Route\n- **URL path:** `/`\n- **Function name:** `root_redirect`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** Redirect to `/dashboard`\n- **Context variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### 2. Dashboard Page\n- **URL path:** `/dashboard`\n- **Function name:** `dashboard`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `dashboard.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `username` (str): Logged in user's username\n  - `featured_books` (list of dicts): List of book summaries with each dict having:\n    - `book_id` (int)\n    - `title` (str)\n    - `author` (str)\n    - `status` (str): \"Available\", \"Borrowed\", or \"Reserved\"\n\n---\n\n### 3. Book Catalog Page\n- **URL path:** `/catalog`\n- **Function name:** `catalog`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `catalog.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dicts): Each dict contains:\n    - `book_id` (int)\n    - `title` (str)\n    - `author` (str)\n    - `status` (str): \"Available\", \"Borrowed\", or \"Reserved\"\n  - `search_query` (str): The current search filter string (empty if none)\n\n---\n\n### 4. Book Details Page\n- **URL path:** `/book/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function name:** `book_details`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `book_details.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Detailed book information with fields:\n    - `book_id` (int)\n    - `title` (str)\n    - `author` (str)\n    - `isbn` (str)\n    - `genre` (str)\n    - `publisher` (str)\n    - `year` (int)\n    - `description` (str)\n    - `status` (str): \"Available\", \"Borrowed\", or \"Reserved\"\n    - `avg_rating` (float)\n  - `reviews` (list of dicts): Each dict has:\n    - `review_id` (int)\n    - `username` (str)\n    - `rating` (int)\n    - `review_text` (str)\n    - `review_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n  - `user_can_borrow` (bool): Whether current user can borrow\n  - `user_can_review` (bool): Whether current user can write a review\n\n---\n\n### 5. Borrow Confirmation Page (GET)\n- **URL path:** `/borrow/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function name:** `borrow_confirmation`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `borrow_confirmation.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Contains at least `book_id`, `title`, `author`\n  - `due_date` (str): Due date string, 14 days from borrow date (format YYYY-MM-DD)\n\n---\n\n### 6. Borrow Confirmation POST\n- **URL path:** `/borrow/confirm`\n- **Function name:** `confirm_borrow`\n- **HTTP method:** POST\n- **Template rendered:** `borrow_success.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Borrowed book details\n  - `due_date` (str): Due date string\n\n---\n\n### 7. Borrow Cancellation\n- **URL path:** `/borrow/cancel`\n- **Function name:** `cancel_borrow`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** Redirect to `/catalog`\n- **Context variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### 8. My Borrowings Page\n- **URL path:** `/myborrows`\n- **Function name:** `my_borrowings`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `my_borrows.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `borrowings` (list of dicts): Each dict includes:\n    - `borrow_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `borrow_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n    - `due_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n    - `status` (str): \"Active\", \"Returned\", or \"Overdue\"\n    - `fine_amount` (float)\n  - `filter_status` (str): Current filter dropdown selection (\"All\", \"Active\", \"Returned\", \"Overdue\")\n\n---\n\n### 9. Return Book POST\n- **URL path:** `/return/<int:borrow_id>`\n- **Function name:** `return_book`\n- **HTTP method:** POST\n- **Template rendered:** `return_confirmation.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `borrowing` (dict): Details about the borrowing record including:\n    - `borrow_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `borrow_date` (str)\n    - `due_date` (str)\n    - `status` (str)\n  - `fine_amount` (float): Fine due if any\n\n---\n\n### 10. My Reservations Page\n- **URL path:** `/reservations`\n- **Function name:** `my_reservations`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `reservations.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `reservations` (list of dicts): Each dict contains:\n    - `reservation_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `reservation_date` (str)\n    - `status` (str): \"Active\" or \"Cancelled\"\n\n---\n\n### 11. Cancel Reservation POST\n- **URL path:** `/reservation/cancel/<int:reservation_id>`\n- **Function name:** `cancel_reservation`\n- **HTTP method:** POST\n- **Template rendered:** Redirect to `/reservations`\n- **Context variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### 12. My Reviews Page\n- **URL path:** `/myreviews`\n- **Function name:** `my_reviews`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `my_reviews.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dicts): Each dict contains:\n    - `review_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `rating` (int)\n    - `review_text` (str)\n\n---\n\n### 13. Delete Review POST\n- **URL path:** `/review/delete/<int:review_id>`\n- **Function name:** `delete_review`\n- **HTTP method:** POST\n- **Template rendered:** Redirect to `/myreviews`\n- **Context variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### 14. Edit Review Page (GET)\n- **URL path:** `/review/edit/<int:review_id>`\n- **Function name:** `edit_review`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `review` (dict): Existing review details:\n    - `review_id` (int)\n    - `book_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `rating` (int)\n    - `review_text` (str)\n  - `book` (dict): Book details for display\n\n---\n\n### 15. Write Review POST\n- **URL path:** `/review/submit`\n- **Function name:** `submit_review`\n- **HTTP method:** POST\n- **Template rendered:** Redirect to the book details page `/book/<book_id>`\n- **Context variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### 16. User Profile Page\n- **URL path:** `/profile`\n- **Function name:** `profile`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `profile.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `username` (str)\n  - `email` (str)\n  - `phone` (str)\n  - `address` (str)\n  - `borrow_history` (list of dicts): Each dict has:\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `borrow_date` (str)\n    - `return_date` (str or None)\n\n---\n\n### 17. Update Profile POST\n- **URL path:** `/profile/update`\n- **Function name:** `update_profile`\n- **HTTP method:** POST\n- **Template rendered:** Redirect to `/profile`\n- **Context variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### 18. Payment Confirmation Page\n- **URL path:** `/payment/<int:fine_id>`\n- **Function name:** `payment_confirmation`\n- **HTTP method:** GET\n- **Template rendered:** `payment_confirmation.html`\n- **Context variables:**\n  - `fine` (dict): Fields include:\n    - `fine_id` (int)\n    - `amount` (float)\n\n---\n\n### 19. `3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7`\n\n---\n\n### 3. borrowings.txt\n- **Path:** `data/borrowings.txt`\n- **Fields (pipe-delimited):**\n  1. `borrow_id` (int)\n  2. `username` (str)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `borrow_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n  5. `due_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n  6. `return_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD or empty if not returned)\n  7. `status` (str): \"Active\", \"Returned\", or \"Overdue\"\n  8. `fine_amount` (float)\n- **Description:** Tracks user borrowings\n- **Example entries:**\n  - Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'OnlineLibrary' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'OnlineLibrary' web application will consist of the following ten pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Library Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.   - **ID: browse-books-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.   - **ID: my-borrows-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.  ### 2. Book Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Book Catalog - **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options. - **Elements**:   - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.   - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.   - **ID: book-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.   - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Borrow Confirmation Page - **Page Title**: Borrow Confirmation - **Overview**: A page to confirm book borrowing details. - **Elements**:   - **ID: borrow-page** - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.   - **ID: borrow-book-info** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.   - **ID: due-date-display** - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).   - **ID: confirm-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.   - **ID: cancel-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.  ### 5. My Borrowings Page - **Page Title**: My Borrowings - **Overview**: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: my-borrows-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.   - **ID: filter-status** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).   - **ID: borrows-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.   - **ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id}** - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. My Reservations Page - **Page Title**: My Reservations - **Overview**: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.   - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.   - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. My Reviews Page - **Page Title**: My Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.   - **ID: edit-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).   - **ID: delete-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: book-info-display** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.   - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.   - **ID: back-to-book** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.   - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).   - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.   - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.   - **ID: borrow-history** - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 10. Payment Confirmation Page - **Page Title**: Payment Confirmation - **Overview**: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines. - **Elements**:   - **ID: payment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.   - **ID: fine-amount-display** - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.   - **ID: confirm-payment-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.   - **ID: back-to-profile** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'OnlineLibrary' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   username|email|phone|address   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St   jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St   ```  ### 2. Books Data - **File Name**: `books.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8   2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6   3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7   4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5   5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3   ```  ### 3. Borrowings Data - **File Name**: `borrowings.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0   2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0   3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00   ```  ### 4. Reservations Data - **File Name**: `reservations.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active   2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled   ```  ### 5. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03   2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20   ```  ### 6. Fines Data - **File Name**: `fines.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30   ```  All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

Each dict includes:\n    - `book_id` (int)\n    - `title` (str)\n    - `author` (str)\n    - `status` (str)\n  - `search_query` (str): Search term entered by the user (empty string if none)\n\n---\n\n### Route 4: Book Details Page\n- **URL Path:** `/book/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `book_details`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `book_details.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Complete details about the book:\n    - `book_id` (int)\n    - `title` (str)\n    - `author` (str)\n    - `isbn` (str)\n    - `genre` (str)\n    - `publisher` (str)\n    - `year` (int)\n    - `description` (str)\n    - `status` (str): Availability status\n    - `avg_rating` (float)\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): Reviews of the book with:\n    - `review_id` (int)\n    - `username` (str)\n    - `rating` (int)\n    - `review_text` (str)\n    - `review_date` (str in YYYY-MM-DD format)\n  - `user_can_borrow` (bool): Whether current user is allowed to borrow\n  - `user_can_review` (bool): Whether current user can write/edit review\n\n---\n\n### Route 5: Borrow Confirmation Page (GET)\n- **URL Path:** `/borrow/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `borrow_confirmation`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `borrow_confirmation.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Book info including `book_id`, `title`, `author`\n  - `due_date` (str): Due date 14 days from borrowing (YYYY-MM-DD)\n\n---\n\n### Route 6: Confirm Borrow POST\n- **URL Path:** `/borrow/confirm`\n- **Function Name:** `confirm_borrow`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** `borrow_success.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Details of borrowed book\n  - `due_date` (str): Due date for returning\n\n---\n\n### Route 7: Cancel Borrowing\n- **URL Path:** `/borrow/cancel`\n- **Function Name:** `cancel_borrow`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/catalog`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### Route 8: My Borrowings Page\n- **URL Path:** `/myborrows`\n- **Function Name:** `my_borrowings`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `my_borrows.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `borrowings` (list of dict): Borrowed books with fields:\n    - `borrow_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `borrow_date` (str)\n    - `due_date` (str)\n    - `status` (str): \"Active\", \"Returned\", \"Overdue\"\n    - `fine_amount` (float)\n  - `filter_status` (str): Current selected filter value from dropdown (\"All\", \"Active\", \"Returned\", \"Overdue\")\n\n---\n\n### Route 9: Return Book POST\n- **URL Path:** `/return/<int:borrow_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `return_book`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** `return_confirmation.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `borrowing` (dict): Borrowing info:\n    - `borrow_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `borrow_date` (str)\n    - `due_date` (str)\n    - `status` (str)\n  - `fine_amount` (float): Applicable fine amount (0.0 if none)\n\n---\n\n### Route 10: My Reservations Page\n- **URL Path:** `/reservations`\n- **Function Name:** `my_reservations`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `reservations.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reservations` (list of dict): Each reservation with:\n    - `reservation_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `reservation_date` (str)\n    - `status` (str): \"Active\" or \"Cancelled\"\n\n---\n\n### Route 11: Cancel Reservation POST\n- **URL Path:** `/reservation/cancel/<int:reservation_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `cancel_reservation`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/reservations`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### Route 12: My Reviews Page\n- **URL Path:** `/myreviews`\n- **Function Name:** `my_reviews`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `my_reviews.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): Each review with:\n    - `review_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `rating` (int)\n    - `review_text` (str)\n\n---\n\n### Route 13: Delete Review POST\n- **URL Path:** `/review/delete/<int:review_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `delete_review`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/myreviews`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### Route 14: Edit Review Page GET\n- **URL Path:** `/review/edit/<int:review_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `edit_review`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `review` (dict): Existing review details:\n    - `review_id` (int)\n    - `book_id` (int)\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `rating` (int)\n    - `review_text` (str)\n  - `book` (dict): Book details for display\n\n---\n\n### Route 15: Submit Review POST\n- **URL Path:** `/review/submit`\n- **Function Name:** `submit_review`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/book/<book_id>`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### Route 16: User Profile Page\n- **URL Path:** `/profile`\n- **Function Name:** `profile`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `profile.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `username` (str)\n  - `email` (str)\n  - `phone` (str)\n  - `address` (str)\n  - `borrow_history` (list of dict): Each entry with:\n    - `book_title` (str)\n    - `borrow_date` (str)\n    - `return_date` (str or None)\n\n---\n\n### Route 17: Update Profile POST\n- **URL Path:** `/profile/update`\n- **Function Name:** `update_profile`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/profile`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n---\n\n### Route 18: Payment Confirmation Page\n- **URL Path:** `/payment/<int:fine_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `payment_confirmation`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `payment_confirmation.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `fine` (dict): Contains:\n    - `fine_id` (int)\n    - `amount` (float)\n\n---\n\n### Route 19: Confirm Payment POST\n- **URL Path:** `/payment/confirm/<int:fine_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `confirm_payment`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/profile`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n---\n\n\n## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications (Frontend)\n\n### Template 1: dashboard.html\n- **Path:** `templates/dashboard.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Library Dashboard\"\n- **Main Header (`<h1>`):** \n  -
